issues.title: The home page looks a little boring
issues.description: Add some sort of gradient grid to it to make it a bit more visually interesting.

issues.title: Github OAuth to Atribut bugs to users.
Comments section on all issue types
issues.description: Users can explain what they are doing, how progress is going, etc with a comments feed.

issues.title: Add History to issues
issues.description: Just a log of how its status has changed over time. Basically, when it was created, when its status was updated and what it was updated to and who by, and when it was closed and who by.

issues.title: Completed should be hidden by default
issues.description: There should be a toggle check button to show completed
